news.title: Historische Villa im Kölner Zoo wird 4 Wochen lang ein Sterne-Restaurant - Verliebt in Köln
news.summary:
# Summary

A historic villa inside Cologne Zoo will temporarily transform into a Michelin-starred restaurant for four weeks. This pop-up dining experience offers visitors a unique opportunity to enjoy fine dining in an unconventional and memorable setting within the zoo grounds. It's an attractive option for food enthusiasts visiting Cologne who want to combine gastronomy with the distinctive ambiance of the historic villa.
